overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the neon-lit streets of Night City at night. The character traverses wide sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes through a commercial district featuring bright holographic advertisements and neon storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide pedestrian sidewalk with illuminated advertising pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide city sidewalk toward the illuminated intersection, passing benches and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: man in orange jacket walking past the camera from left to right

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure wrapped in red neon lighting with a square illuminated base
large building-mounted screens displaying colorful advertisements
dark colored bench seating along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide Night City sidewalk at night, dominated by a massive red illuminated pillar in the center of the walkway. Digital billboards glow on the left side of the street while sparse pedestrians move about. The concrete pavement reflects the neon lighting from surrounding advertisements.

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the street
entering the covered area beneath the transit overpass

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk and continuing forward under the overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
elevated transit track with angular support beams and integrated lighting
dark wet asphalt street surface with reflective lighting

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide city street at a marked crosswalk, moving from the open sidewalk into the shadow of an elevated overpass. Vehicles pass by on the road as the lighting shifts from open neon glow to the darker, more enclosed environment beneath the transit structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass

events.description: ambient light drops significantly under the overpass with focused neon accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass toward the neon-lit commercial district ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: building facade with bright red neon XXX signage and green trim lighting
staircase leading up to the building entrance with illuminated edges

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated transit overpass, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. The character approaches a building with prominent red neon XXX signage and green neon trim. The concrete stairs and dark surroundings contrast with the bright commercial lighting ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial strip with adult entertainment and food vendors

events.description: arriving at the XXX club entrance with bright neon signage and digital posters
passing the large holographic face advertisement and burrito stand

agents.ego_description: walking past the neon XXX club and various storefronts, observing the street scene and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: security guard standing at the entrance of the XXX club

entered.detail: small food vendor booth with red neon BURRITO signage
large vertical holographic display showing a woman's face with blue hair and glowing red eyes
wall covered with illuminated advertising posters including vehicle and beverage ads

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vibrant commercial strip featuring the neon-lit XXX club entrance with green and red signage. The scene includes a burrito food stand, groups of pedestrians, and a massive holographic face advertisement. The sidewalk is lined with digital posters and the atmosphere is dense with neon lighting and urban nightlife activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that shifts from an open city sidewalk into a dense, vibrant commercial district. It begins on a wide walkway dominated by a massive red illuminated pillar and glowing digital billboards that reflect off the concrete pavement. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions across a marked crosswalk and into the deepening shadows beneath an elevated transit overpass, where the open neon glow gives way to a more enclosed environment. The camera then emerges from the darkness of the overpass toward a building marked by striking red and green neon signage. Finally, the environment opens into a bustling commercial strip filled with pedestrians, a burrito food stand, and a massive holographic face advertisement amidst a dense array of digital posters.
